title: Resolution approving and adopting the Resolution No. 105 series of 2018 dated December 4, 2018, ?Resolution by the Sangguniang Barangay of Maahas, Los Baños, Laguna, interposing no objection to the proposed construction of Globe Telecomminication?s Cell Site (42.0-meter Three (3) Legged Self Supporting Tower) at Purok 2 of Barangay Maahas, Los Baños, Laguna.?
